ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلنَّـٰزِعَـٰتِ غَرْقًا ١
ayahs.translation: By those [angels] who extract with violence

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلنَّـٰشِطَـٰتِ نَشْطًا ٢
ayahs.translation: And [by] those who remove with ease

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلسَّـٰبِحَـٰتِ سَبْحًا ٣
ayahs.translation: And [by] those who glide [as if] swimming

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَٱلسَّـٰبِقَـٰتِ سَبْقًا ٤

words.translation: And those who race each other

ayahs.translation: And those who race each other in a race

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَٱلْمُدَبِّرَٲتِ أَمْرًا ٥
ayahs.translation: And those who arrange [each] matter,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَوْمَ تَرْجُفُ ٱلرَّاجِفَةُ ٦
ayahs.translation: On the Day the blast [of the Horn] will convulse [creation],

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: تَتْبَعُهَا ٱلرَّادِفَةُ ٧
ayahs.translation: There will follow it the subsequent [one].

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قُلُوبٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ وَاجِفَةٌ ٨
ayahs.translation: Hearts, that Day, will tremble,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَبْصَـٰرُهَا خَـٰشِعَةٌ ٩
ayahs.translation: Their eyes humbled.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَقُولُونَ أَءِنَّا لَمَرْدُودُونَ فِى ٱلْحَافِرَةِ ١٠
ayahs.translation: They are [presently] saying, "Will we indeed be returned to [our] former state [of life]?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَءِذَا كُنَّا عِظَـٰمًا نَّخِرَةً ١١
ayahs.translation: Even if we should be decayed bones?"

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالُواْ تِلْكَ إِذًا كَرَّةٌ خَاسِرَةٌ ١٢
ayahs.translation: They say, "That, then, would be a losing return."

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَإِنَّمَا هِىَ زَجْرَةٌ وَٲحِدَةٌ ١٣
ayahs.translation: Indeed, it will be but one shout,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَإِذَا هُم بِٱلسَّاهِرَةِ ١٤
ayahs.translation: And suddenly they will be [alert] upon the earth's surface.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: هَلْ أَتَـٰكَ حَدِيثُ مُوسَىٰٓ ١٥
ayahs.translation: Has there reached you the story of Moses? -

ayahs.textUthmani: إِذْ نَادَىٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ بِٱلْوَادِ ٱلْمُقَدَّسِ طُوًى
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِذْ نَادَٮٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ بِٱلْوَادِ ٱلْمُقَدَّسِ طُوًى ١٦
ayahs.textIndopak: اِذۡ نَادٰٮهُ رَبُّهٗ بِالۡوَادِ الۡمُقَدَّسِ طُوًى​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: When his Lord called to him in the sacred valley of Ṭuwā,
ayahs.transliteration: Iz nadaahu rabbuhu bil-waadil muqad-dasi tuwa

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ٱذْهَبْ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ إِنَّهُۥ طَغَىٰ ١٧
ayahs.translation: "Go to Pharaoh. Indeed, he has transgressed.

ayahs.textUthmani: فَقُلْ هَل لَّكَ إِلَىٰٓ أَن تَزَكَّىٰ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَقُلْ هَل لَّكَ إِلَىٰٓ أَن تَزَكَّىٰ ١٨
ayahs.textIndopak: فَقُلۡ هَلۡ لَّكَ اِلٰٓى اَنۡ تَزَكّٰى ۙ‏
ayahs.translation: And say to him, 'Would you [be willing to] purify yourself
ayahs.transliteration: Faqul hal laka ilaa an tazakka

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَأَهْدِيَكَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ فَتَخْشَىٰ ١٩
ayahs.translation: And let me guide you to your Lord so you would fear [Him]?'"

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَأَرَٮٰهُ ٱلْأَيَةَ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰ ٢٠
ayahs.translation: And he showed him the greatest sign,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَكَذَّبَ وَعَصَىٰ ٢١
ayahs.translation: But he [i.e., Pharaoh] denied and disobeyed.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ثُمَّ أَدْبَرَ يَسْعَىٰ ٢٢
ayahs.translation: Then he turned his back, striving [i.e., plotting].

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَحَشَرَ فَنَادَىٰ ٢٣
ayahs.translation: And he gathered [his people] and called out.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَقَالَ أَنَا۟ رَبُّكُمُ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰ ٢٤
ayahs.translation: And said, "I am your most exalted lord."

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَأَخَذَهُ ٱللَّهُ نَكَالَ ٱلْأَخِرَةِ وَٱلْأُولَىٰٓ ٢٥
ayahs.translation: So Allāh seized him in exemplary punishment for the last and the first [transgression]..

ayahs.textUthmani: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَعِبْرَةً لِّمَن يَخْشَىٰٓ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّ فِى ذَٲلِكَ لَعِبْرَةً لِّمَن يَخْشَىٰٓ ٢٦
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنَّ فِىۡ ذٰلِكَ لَعِبۡرَةً لِّمَنۡ يَّخۡشٰىؕ‏
ayahs.translation: Indeed in that is a lesson [i.e., warning] for whoever would fear [Allāh].
ayahs.transliteration: Inna fee zaalika la'ibratal limaiy yaksha

ayahs.textUthmani: ءَأَنتُمْ أَشَدُّ خَلْقًا أَمِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ ۚ بَنَىٰهَا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ءَأَنتُمْ أَشَدُّ خَلْقًا أَمِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ‌ۚ بَنَـٰهَا ٢٧
ayahs.textIndopak: ءَاَنۡتُمۡ اَشَدُّ خَلۡقًا اَمِ السَّمَآءُ​ ؕ بَنٰٮهَا‏
ayahs.translation: Are you a more difficult creation or is the heaven? He [i.e., Allāh] constructed it.
ayahs.transliteration: A-antum a-shaddu khalqan amis samaa-u banaaha

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: رَفَعَ سَمْكَهَا فَسَوَّٮٰهَا ٢٨
ayahs.translation: He raised its ceiling and proportioned it.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَأَغْطَشَ لَيْلَهَا وَأَخْرَجَ ضُحَـٰهَا ٢٩
ayahs.translation: And He darkened its night and extracted its brightness.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلْأَرْضَ بَعْدَ ذَٲلِكَ دَحَـٰهَآ ٣٠
ayahs.translation: And after that He spread the earth.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَخْرَجَ مِنْهَا مَآءَهَا وَمَرْعَـٰهَا ٣١
ayahs.translation: He extracted from it its water and its pasture,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلْجِبَالَ أَرْسَـٰهَا ٣٢
ayahs.translation: And the mountains He set firmly

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: مَتَـٰعًا لَّكُمْ وَلِأَنْعَـٰمِكُمْ ٣٣
ayahs.translation: As enjoyment [i.e., provision] for you and your grazing livestock.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَإِذَا جَآءَتِ ٱلطَّآمَّةُ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰ ٣٤
ayahs.translation: But when there comes the greatest Overwhelming Calamity -

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَوْمَ يَتَذَكَّرُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ مَا سَعَىٰ ٣٥
ayahs.translation: The Day when man will remember that for which he strove,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَبُرِّزَتِ ٱلْجَحِيمُ لِمَن يَرَىٰ ٣٦
ayahs.translation: And Hellfire will be exposed for [all] those who see -

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَأَمَّا مَن طَغَىٰ ٣٧
ayahs.translation: So as for he who transgressed

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَءَاثَرَ ٱلْحَيَوٲةَ ٱلدُّنْيَا ٣٨
ayahs.translation: And preferred the life of the world,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَإِنَّ ٱلْجَحِيمَ هِىَ ٱلْمَأْوَىٰ ٣٩
ayahs.translation: Then indeed, Hellfire will be [his] refuge.

ayahs.textUthmani: وَأَمَّا مَنْ خَافَ مَقَامَ رَبِّهِۦ وَنَهَى ٱلنَّفْسَ عَنِ ٱلْهَوَىٰ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَأَمَّا مَنْ خَافَ مَقَامَ رَبِّهِۦ وَنَهَى ٱلنَّفْسَ عَنِ ٱلْهَوَىٰ ٤٠
ayahs.textIndopak: وَاَمَّا مَنۡ خَافَ مَقَامَ رَبِّهٖ وَ نَهَى النَّفۡسَ عَنِ الۡهَوٰىۙ‏
ayahs.translation: But as for he who feared the position of his Lord and prevented the soul from [unlawful] inclination,
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-ammaa man khaafa maqaama Rabbihee Wa-nahan nafsa 'anil hawaa

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَإِنَّ ٱلْجَنَّةَ هِىَ ٱلْمَأْوَىٰ ٤١
ayahs.translation: Then indeed, Paradise will be [his] refuge.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَسْــَٔلُونَكَ عَنِ ٱلسَّاعَةِ أَيَّانَ مُرْسَـٰهَا ٤٢
ayahs.translation: They ask you, [O Muḥammad], about the Hour: when is its arrival?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فِيمَ أَنتَ مِن ذِكْرَٮٰهَآ ٤٣
ayahs.translation: In what [position] are you that you should mention it?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ مُنتَهَـٰهَآ ٤٤
ayahs.translation: To your Lord is its finality.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّمَآ أَنتَ مُنذِرُ مَن يَخْشَـٰهَا ٤٥
ayahs.translation: You are only a warner for those who fear it.

ayahs.textUthmani: كَأَنَّهُمْ يَوْمَ يَرَوْنَهَا لَمْ يَلْبَثُوٓا۟ إِلَّا عَشِيَّةً أَوْ ضُحَىٰهَا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَأَنَّهُمْ يَوْمَ يَرَوْنَهَا لَمْ يَلْبَثُوٓاْ إِلَّا عَشِيَّةً أَوْ ضُحَـٰهَا ٤٦
ayahs.textIndopak: كَاَنَّهُمۡ يَوۡمَ يَرَوۡنَهَا لَمۡ يَلۡبَثُوۡۤا اِلَّا عَشِيَّةً اَوۡ ضُحٰٮهَا‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: It will be, on the Day they see it, as though they had not remained [in the world] except for an afternoon or a morning thereof.
ayahs.transliteration: Ka-annahum Yawma yarawnahaa lam yalbasooo illaa 'ashiyyatan aw duhaahaa
